title: Resume
text:
Summary
Results-driven professional with experience in customer service, sales, and project coordination. Proven ability to assess client needs, deliver tailored solutions, and collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure successful outcomes. Strong communication and problem-solving skills with a track record of training team members and improving customer satisfaction. Seeking opportunities in customer service or project management.

title: Marketing Projects
text:

title: Marketing Projects
text:
Project Slots


Customer Profile or Persona
Add a project that defines a target customer, their goals, pain points, buying motivations, and decision process.


Campaign Concept
Add a campaign idea with objective, audience, message, channels, and success metrics.


Product or Service Positioning
Add a positioning analysis that explains how a product or service should be presented to a specific audience.


Competitive Analysis
Add research comparing brands, products, competitors, pricing, customer experience, or communication strategy.


Retail Sales & Marketing Reflection
Add a reflection connecting Best Buy experience to marketing concepts such as customer journey, value proposition, product education, and relationship building.

title: Arturo Rosas
text:
Customer service professional. Sales advisor. Project coordinator.
I help customers make confident decisions by listening closely, identifying needs, and delivering tailored solutions. My experience spans appliance sales, client communication, product education, team training, project coordination, and business/marketing coursework.
I am currently building a portfolio that connects my professional experience at Best Buy with my academic work in International Business & Marketing, including space for Google Analytics, marketing projects, and coursework-based case studies.
View Resume Work With Me









Needs assessment - understanding customer goals, constraints, priorities, budgets, and decision criteria before recommending a solution
Tailored recommendations - matching clients with high-value appliance products and explaining the practical benefits behind each option
Clear communication - translating product details, project expectations, timelines, and next steps into language customers can trust
Issue resolution - handling complex concerns with patience, professionalism, and a focus on customer satisfaction

Project coordination across customers, contractors, and internal teams to keep expectations aligned
Product knowledge that supports stronger sales conversations and more confident customer decisions
Training and mentoring that helps team members improve product understanding and service quality
CRM, Microsoft Office, and documentation habits that keep customer information and follow-up organized

I’m a results-driven professional with experience in customer service, sales, and project coordination. I have a strong track record of assessing client needs, delivering tailored solutions, and working with cross-functional teams to support successful outcomes.
At Best Buy, I serve as an Appliance Category Advisor, where I help customers evaluate products, coordinate expectations with contractors and clients, resolve complex concerns, and train team members. I am bilingual in Spanish and bring strong communication, problem-solving, and relationship-building skills to customer-facing work.
I am currently pursuing a Bachelor of Science in International Business & Marketing at California State Polytechnic University, Pomona, with expected graduation in 2027. title: Customer Service
text:
Arturo brings hands-on experience helping customers identify their needs, compare options, and move forward with confidence. His customer-service approach is grounded in active listening, clear communication, practical problem solving, and follow-through.
In a retail environment where customers often make expensive and long-term purchase decisions, Arturo focuses on creating trust. He asks questions, explains tradeoffs, and helps customers understand which products fit their home, budget, timeline, and expectations.

title: About
text:
Arturo Rosas is a customer service, sales, and project coordination professional based in Southern California. His experience centers on helping customers make informed decisions, coordinating expectations across clients and contractors, and supporting teams through training and product knowledge.
He currently works as an Appliance Category Advisor at Best Buy in West Covina, CA, where he delivers tailored customer solutions, resolves complex concerns, and mentors team members.
Arturo is pursuing a Bachelor of Science in International Business & Marketing at California State Polytechnic University, Pomona, with expected graduation in 2027. He previously earned associate degrees in Business Administration and Social and Behavioral Sciences from Mt. San Antonio College in 2023.

title: Project Coordination
text:
Arturo has experience collaborating with contractors, clients, and internal teams to keep project plans aligned with expectations and timelines. His coordination experience includes clarifying customer needs, communicating details, and helping ensure the work moves forward with fewer misunderstandings.
Project coordination is one of the strongest bridges between Arturo’s professional experience and future opportunities in customer service, business operations, or project management.

title: Sales
text:
As an Appliance Category Advisor, Arturo supports customers through high-consideration purchases by explaining product value, comparing options, and recommending solutions that fit each customer’s needs. His sales approach is consultative: the goal is not just to sell a product, but to help the customer understand why a product is the right fit.
This experience connects directly to his business and marketing education. Arturo understands that strong sales work depends on customer insight, product positioning, communication, and trust.
